data.body: HANDOFF (2026-07-08): fsck --repair tooling LANDED on main (Gerrit 407) + resurrection-repair edge fix (Gerrit 410). Ticket still in_progress — completion verifier requires 5 more items before close: (1) test the push-failure ABORT path in _repair_run (fsck.py ~598-602); (2) implement + test the 'verify no in-flight pass' check for the reconciler pause (currently only gh workflow disable/enable in finally, no in-flight check); (3) crash-before-marker safety test (.a3-repaired under <gitdir>/a3-repaired/); (4) synthetic MISSING_CREATE fixture test (fsck --repair surfaces, does NOT auto-write); (5) THE LIVE REMEDIATION RUN: rebar fsck --repair on the shared store (~2422 SNAPSHOT_INCONSISTENT + 11 ORPHAN + 1 MISSING_CREATE), record before/after counts in an ops note. Existing tests: test_fsck_snapshot_checks.py (dispositions/retire/dry-run/live-retire), test_concurrency_regression.py (a3 pretag+rollback, resurrection). Then close (require_completion_verification_for_close is on).
